label: Masked prediction objectives

node.label: Masked prediction objectives
node.definition: Hidden portions of an input are predicted from visible context; it operationally connects Self-supervised learning and Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Masked prediction objectives is to connect Self-supervised learning, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units to downstream capabilities including Large-scale pretraining, Encoder-only bidirectional transformers, Diffusion and masked-generative language models.
examples: substrate for Diffusion and masked-generative language models
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.

dependencies.rationale: Masked prediction objectives uses Self-supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Masked prediction objectives uses Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Masked prediction objectives uses Images, video & spatial grids as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

The role of Masked prediction objectives is to connect Self-supervised learning, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units to downstream capabilities including Large-scale pretraining, Encoder-only bidirectional transformers, Diffusion and masked-generative language models.
